title: The Guardian of Forever!

"'''The Guardian of Forever!'''" is a comic story which serves as the third part of a three-part comics series written by [[Chris Claremont]], originally published in the UK's ''[[Star Wars Weekly 113]]–[[Star Wars Weekly 115|115]]''. It was reprinted in 1981 in the [[Marvel Illustrated Books]] collection ''[[Star Wars 2: World of Fire]]'', where it was named after the first part published in ''Star Wars Weekly 113''. The other two original parts are "[[Betrayal!]]" and "[[The Monster's Secret!]]." The story was started in ''[[World of Fire!]]'' and ''[[The Word for World is Death!]]''.

==Plot summary==
''The Guardian of Forever!'' continues the story of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] that are in the process of searching the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alashan]]. Along with [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Wil'm Grau]], the team enters an [[Unidentified Alashan city|underground city]] and go exploring. However, they are attacked by the [[Sentinel (creature)|Sentinel]] who is intent on stopping the intruders to its home. After a hunt in which the Guardian almost kills the team, Leia Organa finds the source of the Guardian's power in the [[Alashan control center]]. Destroying the structure, they are able to destroy the Guardian. After digging out of the rubble, the team boards the ''[[Staraker]]'' and Organa offers Grau a place in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. However, he declines, leaving the ship in an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]. As the [[Human/Legends|Humans]] leave the planet, the destroyed underground city comes to life and a cryptic laughing resounds through the complex...
